content.speakerText: Just to confirm, will this count as overtime pay or time off?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认下，这算加班费还是调休？

options.text: I'll take it as a vacation next month.
It'll be paid as overtime—HR's policy hasn't changed.
I don't care as long as I get extra money.
Can we skip the compensation this time?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了专业且礼貌的表达 'It'll be paid as overtime—HR's policy hasn't changed.'，符合职场沟通规范。选项1虽然意思接近，但 'vacation' 不等于 'time off' 在加班补偿语境中的准确用法；选项3语气过于随意，缺乏专业性；选项4直接拒绝补偿，不符合礼貌询问的语境。

content.speakerText: Could you clarify how the company handles compensation for weekend work?
content.speakerTextCn: 您能说明一下公司如何处理周末工作的补偿吗？

options.text: We don't pay for weekends—that's just part of the job.
It's either paid at 1.5x rate or you can take equivalent time off later.
I'm not sure, ask your manager.
Weekend work is optional, so no compensation is needed.

content.explanation: 正确答案准确描述了加班补偿的两种常见形式（加班费或调休），语言专业且完整。选项1和4态度消极且不符合劳动政策规范；选项3推卸责任，不符合积极沟通的职场礼仪。

content.speakerText: I worked late last night. Will that be compensated as overtime?
content.speakerTextCn: 我昨晚加班了，这会算作加班补偿吗？

options.text: Maybe—if you remind HR next week.
Yes, absolutely. It will be processed as overtime pay.
You should have asked before staying late.
We only compensate if it's approved in advance.

content.explanation: 正确答案明确、肯定且礼貌地确认了补偿，符合职场沟通原则。选项1模糊且推脱责任；选项3指责对方，语气不当；选项4虽可能是事实，但未直接回应补偿请求，缺乏建设性。

content.template: Just to ___ , will this count as overtime pay or time off?
content.hint: 这是职场中礼貌确认信息的固定表达

content.template: This overtime will be compensated ___ either pay or time off.
content.hint: 表示‘以……方式补偿’的常用介词

content.template: Could you please confirm if ___ policy allows for overtime pay?
content.hint: 需要所有格形式来修饰 'policy'

content.speakerText: Just to confirm, will this count as overtime pay or time off?
content.speakerTextCn: 确认下，这算加班费还是调休？
expectedAnswers: It'll be paid as overtime—HR's policy hasn't changed.
We can offer you time off next week instead.
Overtime pay, no problem. I'll make sure it's processed by Friday.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确回应了加班补偿方式（加班费或调休）
语言准确性：语法正确，用词专业，无中式英语
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合职场语境，使用了 'just to confirm' 或类似表达

content.speakerText: I worked 5 extra hours this week. How will this be compensated?
content.speakerTextCn: 我这周加班了5个小时，这会怎么补偿？
expectedAnswers: You'll receive overtime pay at 1.5 times your regular rate.
We can schedule you for equivalent time off next week.
Either option works—I’ll update your timesheet and let HR know.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确说明补偿方式（加班费或调休），或提供选择
语言准确性：使用了 'overtime pay', 'time off', 'equivalent' 等关键词
表达自然度：语句流畅，符合职场对话习惯，避免生硬或命令式语气

content.speakerText: I'm not sure about our policy on weekend overtime. Could you clarify?
content.speakerTextCn: 我不太清楚公司关于周末加班的政策，您能说明一下吗？
expectedAnswers: Sure! Weekend work is compensated at double time, or you can take two days off later.
Our policy allows for either overtime pay or compensatory time off—whichever you prefer.
I'll send you the official policy document. Generally, weekend hours are paid at 1.5x.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰解释补偿政策，回应了对方对政策的疑问
语言准确性：使用了 'overtime pay', 'compensatory time off', 'double time' 等专业词汇
表达自然度：语气友好、有帮助性，避免使用 'I don't know' 或推诿
